name: nestjs-best-practices
description: NestJS API best-practice skill and adapters for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: High-priority NestJS API guidance for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin to install NestJS API best-practice guidance into Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, GitHub Copilot, Cline, Roo Code, Continue, Aider, and OpenCode.
defaultPrompt: Use $nestjs-best-practices to review this NestJS API implementation.
